items.label: 1. Downside objective accomplished

items.label: 3. Activity bullish
items.detail: Rallies should show better effort than reactions.

items.label: 4. Downward stride broken
items.detail: Price needs to stop respecting the old downtrend line or shelf.

items.label: 5. Higher lows
items.detail: The base should stop printing lower lows.

items.label: 6. Higher highs
items.detail: Demand should start winning the swing highs.

items.label: 7. Stock stronger than the market
items.detail: Relative strength should at least hold up versus VNINDEX.

items.label: 8. Base forming
items.detail: A tradable accumulation needs a box or cause to build against.
